p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 7 new pass_to_pass tests to test_outputs.py. These tests verify the with-docker example's structural integrity - checking Dockerfiles have proper stages, required files exist, package.json is valid, and README has required sections. All 9 p2p tests pass on base commit (2 existing + 7 new). The 6 f2p tests fail on base commit as expected and will pass after gold fix is applied.
